props.ChoiceText: A book was taken from you in the name of order, and you discovered how fiercely scholarship can become possessive.
props.ChoiceBio: A confiscated book taught you that attachment to knowledge can look remarkably like vice when searched.

0.TransitionText: Because a confiscated book taught you that attachment to knowledge can look remarkably like vice when searched, you retreated toward scholarship and safer forms of learning.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Scholar, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a confiscated book taught you how easily knowledge can resemble vice, losing one text drove you back to books and caution.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Scholar, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a confiscated book taught you that attachment to knowledge can look remarkably like vice when searched, deprivation only sharpened your appetite for darker study.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.
